label: plain_text
text:
We must decide the scale
e (for example, 1 unit length = 1 student
or 1 unit length =  200) for a bar g
graph on the basis of the data
including
g the minimum and maximum frequencies, so that the
resulting bar graph fits nicely and looks visually appealing on the
paper or poster we are preparing. The markings of the unit lengths
as per the scale must start from zero.
